query:
INSERT INTO ts_kv_latest
                       (entity_id, key, ts, bool_v, long_v, dbl_v, str_v, json_v, version)
                       VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,NULL,0)
                       ON CONFLICT (entity_id, key) DO UPDATE
                       SET ts=$3, bool_v=$4, long_v=$5, dbl_v=$6, str_v=$7
